commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 3:8 And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine. Eliada, or Elioda, (2 Kings v. ) styled Baaliada, (chap. ; Calmet) as both have the same meaning, "God's, or the Lord's knowledge. "(Haydock) Nine, excluding the children of Bethsabee. In 2 Kings there are only seven, or, with the sons of Bethsabee, eleven. There must be a mistake in one place, unless the book of Kings only specifies those who were then alive. (Vatable) (Calmet).
